data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Opt-in/opt-out management' but did not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The evidence provided does not include any endpoints or entities that demonstrate the implementation of opt-in/opt-out management, leading to a clear gap in requirement satisfaction. The absence of supporting evidence indicates that this requirement is not covered.
gaps: No evidence of opt-in/opt-out management functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the opt-in/opt-out management functionality.
